headline: Teledyne’s Artemis II And Autonomy Wins Could Be A Game Changer For Teledyne Technologies (TDY)
summary: In early April 2026, Teledyne Technologies announced a series of developments spanning NASA’s Artemis II mission support, an upgraded Prism SKR autonomy platform, new unmanned oceanographic systems for the UK Royal Navy, and upcoming presentations of next-generation marine navigation and hydrographic technologies at the 2026 International Hydrographic Organization Assembly. Together, these announcements underline how Teledyne is knitting together space, defense, and maritime capabilities...

headline: Teledyne to Showcase Integrated Maritime Technology Portfolio at the 2026 IHO Assembly
summary: THOUSAND OAKS, Calif., April 14, 2026--Teledyne Technologies Incorporated (NYSE:TDY) announced today its participation in the 2026 International Hydrographic Organization (IHO) Assembly, taking place April 19–23, 2026, in Monaco. The company will be represented by several of its leading maritime brands – including Teledyne CARIS, Raymarine Commercial, FLIR Marine, ChartWorld, SevenCs, and Teledyne Marine – presenting a unified portfolio of technologies that advance marine navigation, hydrography

headline: Teledyne Technologies (TDY) Launches Upgraded Prism SKR
summary: Teledyne Technologies Inc. (NYSE:TDY) is one of the 7 best electronic equipment stocks to buy according to hedge funds. On April 7, Teledyne Technologies Inc. (NYSE:TDY) FLIR OEM launched an upgrade of Prism SKR that marks a significant change in this software from being an automated targeting solution to a comprehensive, closed-loop autonomy solution.
